creator: fgorter@gmail.com
text:
Don't mean to hijack a bug / code-review here...

It seems amdtemp code is completely missing for Ryzen 7000-series.

There does not appear to be any previous report in bugs.freebsd

Is this a situation where we just need to add the family, or is there something much more involved required here?

Can't seem to find anything unique or obvious in AMD docs, suggesting more how this support might be implemented.
